ddls:
CREATE TABLE "traffic_data" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the data entry */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* The date and time when the data was collected */,
  "large_vehicle_count" INTEGER /* Total count of large vehicles passing through */,
  "large_left_count" INTEGER /* Count of large vehicles turning left */,
  "large_right_count" INTEGER /* Count of large vehicles turning right */,
  "small_vehicle_count" INTEGER /* Total count of small vehicles passing through */,
  "small_left_count" INTEGER /* Count of small vehicles turning left */,
  "small_right_count" INTEGER /* Count of small vehicles turning right */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the monitoring site */,
  "straight_through_count" INTEGER /* Count of vehicles going straight through */,
  "total_vehicle_count" INTEGER /* Total count of all vehicles (sum of large and small vehicles) */,
  "weather_condition" TEXT /* Weather condition during data collection */,
  "traffic_signal_status" TEXT /* Status of traffic signals */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_traffic_data_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES monitoring_sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "monitoring_sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each monitoring site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name assigned to the monitoring site */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the site */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the monitoring site */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the monitoring site */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the monitoring site was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "status" TEXT /* Operational status of the site */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for system login */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "status" TEXT /* User's account status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Date and time of access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "device" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID for tracking user sessions */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
